overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character exploring a waterfront commercial district resembling San Francisco's Fisherman's Wharf. The character walks along brick-paved pedestrian streets past shops and a distinctive giant crab sculpture, navigating through open plazas and covered walkways under overcast, rainy skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront pedestrian street with restaurant storefronts

events.description: giant crab sculpture becomes visible in the distance ahead
character passes the giant crab sculpture on the right side

agents.ego_description: character walking steadily along the brick-paved street, passing by storefronts with red and white striped awnings

notable_agents.action: person in white shirt and shorts walking toward the camera
person in red vest walking away from camera

entered.detail: two-story commercial buildings with red and white striped awnings and restaurant signage
reddish-brown brick paved pedestrian street with wet reflective surface
massive metallic crab sculpture mounted on a vehicle or platform, iconic landmark
black ornate Victorian-style street lamp post

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wet brick-paved waterfront street lined with two-story restaurant buildings featuring red awnings. A massive metallic crab sculpture becomes visible ahead and is passed on the right, while scattered pedestrians walk in opposing directions.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront plaza with city skyline views

events.description: character turns around in the plaza to walk back toward the commercial area
character passes the giant crab sculpture again from the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: character enters the open plaza, performs a 180-degree turn, and begins walking back toward the commercial buildings

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking across the open plaza area

entered.detail: open paved plaza area with benches and planters overlooking the water
distant modern skyscrapers visible through the overcast haze

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide waterfront plaza with views of the distant city skyline. The character turns around and walks back toward the commercial area, passing the giant crab sculpture again which now looms closer on the right side.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial shopping area with restaurants and retail stores

events.description: approaching the Plaistock building and Taqueria restaurant with external wooden stairs

agents.ego_description: character walking past the crab sculpture and continuing through the commercial district toward buildings with prominent signage

notable_agents.action: child in light clothing running ahead on the right sidewalk

entered.detail: multi-story building with large white 'Plaistock' signage on the facade
restaurant with green 'Taqueria' signage and red outdoor picnic tables
external wooden staircase leading to an upper level walkway
covered brick walkway visible ahead beneath the wooden stairs structure

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a busier commercial area with the Plaistock building on the right and a Taqueria on the left. Pedestrians including a running child move in the same direction as the character approaches a covered walkway beneath wooden stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under building overhang

events.description: character enters the covered walkway beneath the wooden stairs structure
character exits the covered walkway onto the street with parking garage

agents.ego_description: character walks under the covered brick walkway, passing a vending machine, transitioning between commercial zones

entered.detail: 'Wizz Energy Drink' vending machine against the wall

segments.scene_description: The character enters a sheltered brick walkway beneath wooden support beams, passing an energy drink vending machine. The lighting shifts to mixed shadows as the character traverses the covered passage before emerging back to the open street.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with parking garage and vehicle traffic

events.description: red car drives past on the adjacent street to the left

agents.ego_description: character walking along the concrete sidewalk next to a street with moving traffic and a multi-story parking structure

notable_agents.action: red sedan driving along the street parallel to the sidewalk

entered.detail: multi-story concrete parking structure with open levels and parked cars
mature trees lining the sidewalk providing sparse canopy
cylindrical 'San Francisco' information display structure with glass panels
raised planters with red and white flowers along the right side

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway, the character walks along a concrete sidewalk next to a parking garage. A red car drives past on the adjacent street while the character passes a San Francisco information kiosk and flower beds under the overcast sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy waterfront district that shifts from open, sculpture-lined streets into sheltered walkways and back into the urban cityscape. It begins with a walk along wet brick-paved streets past red-awning restaurants, passing a massive metallic crab sculpture as pedestrians scatter in opposing directions. As the path opens into a wide waterfront plaza overlooking a distant city skyline, the camera turns back toward the commercial hub, passing the looming crab sculpture once more. The scene then shifts into a busier area between a Taqueria and the Plaistock building, moving past a running child before entering a sheltered brick walkway beneath wooden beams and a vending machine. Finally, the camera emerges from the shadows of the covered passage onto a concrete sidewalk, passing a San Francisco information kiosk and flower beds as a red car drives by under the overcast sky.
